top_repair_themes: BCNCON81 remains blocked by missing exact inspectable reference crop/render.
Several pass rows still need final scale/stroke/body-slimming QA, but their semantic family and color order are now correct.
Special-purpose rows may need a later topmark-variant policy decision; current S-101/OpenCPN row evidence supports the plain yellow simplified beacon body.

verdicts.observed: The repaired Helm candidate is a plain black vertical post/body, but the row has no inspectable exact S-101 or AquaMap reference and the declared OpenCPN reference PNG is absent locally. For this safety-critical constructed/special-purpose beacon row, there is not enough visual evidence to approve the symbol.
verdicts.expected: BCNCON81 exact beacon/constructed special-purpose symbol from a verified S-52/OpenCPN reference crop.
verdicts.judge_comments: FAIL. The repaired Helm candidate is a plain black vertical post/body, but the row has no inspectable exact S-101 or AquaMap reference and the declared OpenCPN reference PNG is absent locally. For this safety-critical constructed/special-purpose beacon row, there is not enough visual evidence to approve the symbol.
verdicts.required_change: BCNCON81 needs an exact local reference crop/render first; then redraw against that crop rather than approving a generic black post.
